title: The Dive Begins
description: On pages 9–12, this part follows Narrator, Unknown person #1, Marines, Nami, Fake Luffy, Franky, Luffy. The core story beat is the dive begins.
scene: The scene centers on the dive begins, with Narrator, Unknown person #1, Marines, Nami, Fake Luffy, Franky, Luffy driving the moment.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm opening the valve!! It's gonna pump in air from our Undersera airbag!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Ahh!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What the...?! this jelly-stuff is expanding!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Whoaaa!! We've got a giant bubble roof!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Is something wrong, USOPP?

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: Did you guys take out all the marines on your way here?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: No... I could hear plenty of them still shouting!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Then why don't I see them heading this way from the island?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If they're not coming, then all the better! We'll just leave before they get here!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Lucky for us if they got caught up in something, right?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: This is the third backup unit!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: fire!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Why not?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A number of giant insects have suddenly appeared to block the way..!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Insects?!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: AAAR GHIH!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I wish you the best of luck... usoppun!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: This is 4th backup unit!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: We must apologise!!! A sudden downpour of rain has ruined our gunpowder!! Our weapons are useless!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...rain?! what do you mean, rain?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The skies above Sabaody are completely clear!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Driiiip

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Don't bother with the lightning!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: We don't want to hit any innocent citizens!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: All these soap bubbles certainly are a bother!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Still, what luck we've had with the winds!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: They've landed us right above the Sabaody archipelago!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Nami-chan, you're a good girl... Good luck on your journey!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: We'll miss you here on Weatheria...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: UNIT 2, who were sent to this area in advance, all seem to have succumbed to heavy depression...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I wanna be a flea...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Depression?! What are you talking about?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's no use... I wanna turn to Moss...

dialogue.speaker: Fake Luffy
dialogue.text: According to their reports, straw hat luffy...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...appears to have fled the scene atop a gigantic bird!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: "A bird?! what are you people playing at?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...right now... we are confronted by an obstruction the likes of which we have never seen...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What do you mean, you don't want to accept our invitation?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Don't be shy!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Let's have a nice cup of tea together\\!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I don't know... if we can hold out...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Sanji- Kyun this is your chance!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Grack!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ARG HH!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hey!! What's Wrong, Sanji?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I dunno... for a moment, it just felt as though someone was crushing my heart...

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: Are you all paying attention?! A coating ship has the ability to reduce the surrounding pressure in various ways!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: In other words, once a ship is coated, it cannot float of its own accord...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: ...so if we remove the "Buoyancy bag" underneath the ship that's currently supporting it, the ship will naturally sink beneath the surface.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I see...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I can see you don't understand.

summary: The Dive Begins. This part advances the crew from their post-timeskip reunion into the undersea route and the first conflicts surrounding Fish-Man Island.
